mdRecord.dcterms:title: War Time Correspondence to Capt. C. M. Stigleman from A. J. Hoback
mdRecord.dcterms:description: War time correspondence, September 24, 1861, to Capt. C. M. Stigleman from A. J. Hoback at Little River, Va. Subject: a false rumor and medical situation in Floyd County. 1 original piece and 1 ¼ page typed transcription.
mdRecord.dcterms:subject: Soldiers
United States
Correspondence
mdRecord.dcterms:provenance: Virginia Polytechnic Institute and State University. University Libraries
